name: How do I compare two AEO strategies or vendors?

mainEntity.name: How do I compare two AEO strategies or vendors?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best comparison is to look at your pages through the lens of user intent and extractability. Ask whether each page answers one question clearly, has visible supporting proof, and is structured well enough that an engine could quote it without guessing.
acceptedAnswer.description: Compare them by answer quality, structure, proof, schema accuracy, and how well they address real user intent. The best approach is the one that makes your content easier to trust and extract.
